visualizations.title: Proper Fraction Structure
visualizations.description: The formal definition of a proper fraction showing the numerator-denominator relationship.

steps.explanation: Numerator: Represents the number of equal parts we have or are considering.
Denominator: Represents the total number of equal parts in one whole.
Condition for proper fraction: Numerator is strictly smaller than the denominator, making the value < 1.

visualizations.title: Representing 3/4 with a Circle Model
visualizations.description: Watch the circle divide into 4 equal segments, shading them one-by-one to represent 3/4.
